title: Grayscaled
description: Changes Almost All of Minecraft's Textures to be Grayscaled
body:
This Resource Pack aims at changing ~~every~~ almost every texture in the game to a black and white styled environment

As this is my first big project that I actually planned on releasing, it's not the best and I can always improve on it! ❤︎

This Texture Pack was made Entirely by Me and takes time to make updates

**[Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/grayscaled-6013850/)** Download

## **Versions**

  - 1.19 or lower   | No
  - 1.20 - 1.20.6   | Maybe
  - 1.21 - 1.21.1   | Yes
  - 1.21.2 - 1.21.3 | I Don't Know
  - 1.21.4          | Yes
  - 1.21.5          | Yes
  - 1.21.6 - 1.21.7 | Yes
  - 1.21.8          | Released
  - 1.21.9 - 1.21.10| Not Yet (Original Plan but changed)
  - 1.21.11         | Not Yet
  - 26.1 - 26.1.2   | Released
  - 26.2            | Maybe
  - 26.3            | I Don't Know

## **Compatibility With Mods or Other Resource Packs**
Currently I do not plan on compatibility.

# **Random Q&A no one asked for but I wanted to answer anyway**
- Is there any way I can support you? - No

- Are you ever going to make a discord server or place to report bugs with all your packs? - Probably not a discord server but I will try to make a place to report bugs with my packs.

- Can I collab or help with your packs? - I don't plan with collaborating and I don't want help with my packs.

- Do you have a youtube channel or anything else for showcases? - No and I probably wont make one.

- How do you make these packs? - I'd rather keep it to myself but mainly editing vanilla textures is part of it.

- Is this pack discontinued? - Not exactly, I do come back to my packs after some time.

## **Grayscaled stuff**

- Inspiration: Well it's hard to explain but I like the style of just shades and I think you have seen something like this before.

- Progress: Almost every texture but I find some things I have to fix or Remove every now and then.

- Motivation: Not much, takes more time then you'd expect to update 1 version.

- Grayscaled State: Okay, I feel like if I could redo the entire pack I would.
